acceptance.kill: generic high-genus f3 plus independent fresh f4/f5 half-covers
acceptance.promote: low-genus/sourceable/recurrent B-line class improving source-normalized half-loss

compute: branch divisor degree and support field degrees
visible involutions or quotients after saturation
cas_tasks.kill_if: high/generic f3 branch class with no quotient or source
cas_tasks.name: Recover normalized B-line class for f3
cas_tasks.promote_if: stable low-genus/sourceable B-line class across guard fields

compute: whether a single source/correspondence controls multiple selected gates
first falsifier showing f4/f5 are fresh independent half-covers
cas_tasks.kill_if: successive conditional classes are unrelated fresh Kummer covers
cas_tasks.name: Compare conditional classes f4/f3 and f5/f4
cas_tasks.promote_if: one extracted class or correspondence enforces multiple gates

do_not_run: more B bucket scoring without a class or source law
large GPU production from Bplus alone
visible monic cubic/quartic scans already killed in q1847

name: p27_b_line_kummer_fixture_packet
purpose: Compact guard-field fixtures for extracting and comparing the B-line Kummer sequence f3(B), f4(B), f5(B), ... after visible low-degree B supports and simple B recurrences were killed.
